song.title: Jesus Thy Blood and Righteousness
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Jesus, Thy blood And righteousness My beauty are, my glorious dress; Midst flaming worlds in these arrayed, With joy shall I lift up my head.
[V2] 2) Bold shall I stand in Thy great day, For who aught to my charge shall lay? Fully absolved by these I am, From sin and fear, from guilt and shame.
[V3] 3) Lord, I believe Thy precious blood, Which, at the mercy seat of God, Forever doth for sinners plead, For me, e’en for my soul, was shed.
[V4] 4) Lord, I believe were sinners more Than sands upon the ocean shore, Thou hast for all a ransom paid, For all a full redemption made.
[V5] 5) This spotless robe The same appears, When ruined nature sinks in years; No age can change its glorious hue, Its glory is forever new.
[V6] 6) Thou God of power, Thou God of love, Let all Thy saints Thy mercy prove; Their beauty this, their glorious dress, Jesus the Lord, our Righteousness.
song.author: Nicholaus L. von Zinzendorf
